jcr:content.jcr:description: Button component test fixtures for GAAM test automation. Extends the style guide with explicit theme (light-theme, dark-theme, auto-theme) and medium-button size styleId combinations required by matrix and interaction specs.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Button — Test Fixtures

text.text:
Button

Buttons are calls to action typically displayed after a Headline and Text. Primary buttons are for high priority interactions while secondary buttons are for lower priority interactions.

text_2131196640_copy_190327064.text: Button Icon - Filled Light S

text_2131196640_copy_2013203531.text: Button Icon - Filled Light S
Button Icon - Filled Light S
Button Icon - Filled Light S
Button Icon - Filled Light S

text_fx_theme_header.text:
Theme Fixtures — Explicit light-theme / dark-theme / auto-theme StyleIds

These sections provide buttons with explicit theme styleIds so that automation tests can assert the correct class presence regardless of background context.

text_fx_medium_header.text:
Medium-Button Size Fixtures — Explicit medium-button StyleId

These instances carry medium-button explicitly even though it is the default size, enabling test assertions on the CSS class without relying on the absence of small-button.
